invalidated_claim.reason: The replay matrix directly materialized revealed answers as training ranks. It proves answer-aligned reconstruction only, not that the frozen revised method independently selects those answers without answer access.

benchmark_scope_correction.processing_rule: Use each stem and option literally, apply the same Ziwei+Bazi reasoning and endpoint rules, and do not exclude, downweight, relabel, or special-case any question because of its subject matter.

steps: Reveal answer and diagnose why the reasoning failed
Absorb valid source knowledge and revise only generalizable reasoning, routing, endpoint, comparison, or interface rules
Freeze the revised method without answers, answer letters, case winners, or post-reveal ranks
Rerun all 25 original questions in an independent answer-isolated runtime
Freeze predictions before reveal and score
If below target, continue the same five-case training loop

allowed_inputs: calendar and regional facts allowed by the source rules
execution_requirements: Independent answer-isolated runtime or fresh model context with no answer memory
Each question creates answer-free blind models for Ziwei and Bazi before option selection
Four-option questions create all six pairwise comparisons
TOP1, TOP2, confidence, strongest competitor and evidence ledger are frozen before reveal
Five option-order perturbation runs are performed without answer access
Only after all prediction artifacts are frozen may the answer vault reveal the answer vector

current_session_limitation.reason: This conversation and its current runtime have already seen all five answer vectors and post-reveal rankings. Re-answering here cannot be represented as answer-isolated.
